detail.description: Kevin Alcántara grounds into a double play, third baseman José Fermín to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Dansby Swanson out at 2nd. Kevin Alcántara out at 1st.
Kevin Alcántara lines out to left fielder Bryan Torres.
Kevin Alcántara singles on a line drive to left fielder Gavin Sheets. Michael Busch scores. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd.
Kevin Alcántara singles on a line drive to left fielder Samad Taylor.
Kevin Alcántara grounds out, third baseman Buddy Kennedy to first baseman Rafael Devers. Michael Conforto to 2nd.
Kevin Alcántara flies out to center fielder Henry Bolte.
Kevin Alcántara grounds into a force out, shortstop Darell Hernaiz to second baseman Jeff McNeil. Ian Happ to 3rd. Michael Busch out at 2nd. Kevin Alcántara to 1st.
Kevin Alcántara singles on a line drive to center fielder José Fermín.
Kevin Alcántara flies out to center fielder José Fermín.
Kevin Alcántara singles on a ground ball to center fielder Spencer Steer. Carson Kelly scores. Michael Busch scores. Ian Happ to 3rd.
Kevin Alcántara lines out to shortstop Elly De La Cruz.
